_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder for embedded PDF viewer

title: What is STEAM?
subtitle: Create, Innovate and Build the Future!
overview: In this session, students learn about STEAM education — Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts and Mathematics. Students explore real-life applications of STEAM, understand future career opportunities, and discover how STEAM helps solve real-world problems using creativity and innovation.

activity.title: Find STEAM Around You
parts: Pictures of robots, doctors, bridges, apps and art
steps: Ask students where they see Science and Technology daily
Challenge: Think of one problem and create a STEAM solution

options: Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts and Mathematics
Sports, Travel, Energy, Air and Machines
Science, Tools, Electricity, Art and Magic
Study, Test, Exam, Answer and Marks
quiz.explanation: STEAM stands for Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts and Mathematics.

quiz.q: Which subject helps us understand nature and experiments?
quiz.explanation: Science helps us understand how the world works.

quiz.q: Coding and computers are part of:
quiz.explanation: Technology includes computers, coding and digital tools.

quiz.q: Who designs and builds bridges and machines?
quiz.explanation: Engineers design and build useful structures and machines.

quiz.q: Which part of STEAM adds creativity and imagination?
quiz.explanation: Arts help us think creatively and design beautifully.
Mathematics helps us calculate and solve problems logically.

quiz.q: Which of these uses STEAM skills?
quiz.explanation: STEAM skills are used in many modern technologies.

quiz.q: Which future field is growing very fast?
quiz.explanation: Many future technologies depend on STEAM learning.

quiz.q: Doctors and scientists use STEAM for:
quiz.explanation: STEAM helps improve healthcare and scientific discoveries.

quiz.q: Which of these is a STEAM career?
quiz.explanation: Many exciting careers are connected to STEAM.

quiz.q: Why is STEAM important for the future?
quiz.explanation: STEAM helps students prepare for future innovation and careers.

quiz.q: Which technology is used in smart robots?
quiz.explanation: Robots use multiple STEAM technologies together.
STEAM helps students become future innovators.
STEAM focuses on hands-on learning, creativity and innovation.
